response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and leadership roles, with recent work in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) and cloud/TypeScript expertise. However, his AI-specific experience is limited to AI-agent tools rather than production-grade GenAI systems, RAG, or vector databases. His lack of a Master's/PhD and minimal evidence of multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI) also raise concerns. His strong general engineering background and recent AI-adjacent work justify a 'maybe' interview recommendation.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with leadership experience in Staff/Staff+ roles (re:cinq, Optilyz)
Recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) and cloud platforms (AWS, TypeScript)
Proven ability to lead technical projects (GISCollective, open-source contributions) and mentor teams
concerns: Limited direct experience with GenAI production systems (RAG, vector databases) or LLM optimization metrics
No Master's/PhD in AI/CS (only Bachelor's degrees) and minimal evidence of multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
No explicit mention of vector databases or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures in resume

key_factors.factor: GenAI production system expertise (RAG, vector DBs)
